nasb.text: I, Paul, am writing this with my own hand, I will repay it (not to mention to you that you owe to me even your own self as well).

esv.text: I, Paul, write this with my own hand: I will repay it—to say nothing of your owing me even your own self.

cnv.text: “我必償還”，這是我保羅親手寫的。用不著我說，甚至你的生命，你也是欠我的。

ccb.text: 我保罗在此亲笔保证，我必偿还。其实我不说你也知道，连你自己也欠我。

csbs.text: 我保罗亲手写下：我必偿还——免得我对你说，连你自己也是欠我的呢！
